name: Just Friends
description: Six manifold slope generators tuned to integer ratios (1N–6N). Switchable between shape-rate envelopes/LFOs and sound-rate oscillators. Extended RUN firmware modes reveal polyphonic LPG, FM and ratcheted behaviours.

controls.name: TIME
controls.description: Master speed of the IDENTITY slope. Other channels (2N–6N) scale from this via INTONE.
controls.detail: shape: minutes–ms · sound: ms–µs · v/8 tracking via TIME CV

controls.name: INTONE
controls.description: Sets harmonic ratio of channels 2N–6N relative to IDENTITY. Noon = all unison; CW multiplies (up to 6N); CCW divides (down to 1/6).
controls.detail: CCW: undertone series · noon: unison · CW: overtone series

controls.name: CURVE
controls.description: Waveshape of every slope. Sweeps from rectangular through log/linear/expo to sine.
controls.detail: CCW: pulse · noon: linear · CW: sine · full-sweep via ±5V CV

controls.name: RAMP
controls.description: Rise/fall balance. CCW = instant attack + long release (saw); CW = long attack + instant release (ramp). Total duration unchanged.
controls.detail: Symmetric at noon · with CURVE full CCW becomes audio-rate PWM in cycle mode

controls.name: FM
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator routing FM INPUT. CW feeds TIME (pitch FM); CCW feeds INTONE (ratio FM).
controls.detail: CCW: INTONE FM · noon: zero · CW: TIME FM

controls.name: MODE switch
controls.description: Three-position mode selector shared by all six channels: TRANSIENT (triggered AR), SUSTAIN (gated ASR), CYCLE (free-running).

controls.name: RANGE switch
controls.description: Two-position switch toggling between control-rate shape and audio-rate sound.

inputs.name: TIME (v/8)
inputs.description: 1V/oct CV for IDENTITY speed. Tracks across shape and sound ranges.

inputs.name: INTONE
inputs.description: CV for ratio parameter. ±5V at noon sweeps 1/N to N.

inputs.name: FM INPUT
inputs.description: Audio-rate modulation source. DC-coupled in shape; AC-coupled in sound for through-zero FM.

inputs.name: RUN
inputs.description: Selects and CV-controls RUN modes (SHIFT/STRATA/VOLLEY/SPILL/PLUME/FLOOM). Unpatched = standard modes.

inputs.name: TRIGGER 1N / IDENTITY
inputs.description: Trigger or gate for the IDENTITY channel. Normalled forward to 2N…6N unless 2N is patched.

inputs.name: TRIGGER 2N
inputs.description: Trigger/gate for 2N channel. Normalled from IDENTITY; breaks normal and cascades onward when patched.

inputs.name: TRIGGER 6N
inputs.description: Trigger/gate for 6N channel. A single trigger here with no others patched excites all six channels via reverse-cascade normalling.

outputs.name: MIX
outputs.description: shape: largest-of-scaled-slopes (envelope priority). sound: tanh-limited sum of all six (~15Vpp).

behaviors.name: TRANSIENT mode
behaviors.description: Each channel is a triggered attack-release slope. Rising edges fire an AR shaped by CURVE and RAMP. In shape range this is six clock-divided/multiplied envelopes; in sound range it becomes an impulse-train oscillator family covering subharmonics.

behaviors.name: SUSTAIN mode
behaviors.description: Gate-sensitive ASR: while the gate is high the slope climbs to its peak and sustains; gate low releases. In sound range it produces trapezoid VCOs whose pulse width follows the incoming gate length — enables PWM tracking.

behaviors.name: CYCLE mode
behaviors.description: Free-running. In shape = six temporally-related LFOs forming polyrhythms from INTONE. In sound = a harmonic/undertone oscillator stack: CW INTONE produces overtone series (2N=octave, 3N=octave+5th, 4N=2 oct…), CCW produces undertones.

behaviors.name: Trigger normalling cascade
behaviors.trigger: Single cable into TRIGGER 6N with others unpatched
behaviors.description: Trigger jacks are reverse-normalled so that a cable into 6N alone fires all six channels. Patching any individual trigger breaks the normal at that point. Enables one-cable polyrhythmic triggering; each patched cable 'carves off' that channel to external control.

behaviors.name: FM knob routing
behaviors.description: The FM knob is a bipolar crossfade: full CW sends the FM INPUT to TIME (pitch/speed FM); full CCW sends it to INTONE (ratio FM, re-voicing the manifold). Mid positions blend both destinations. FM INPUT is AC-coupled in sound range for through-zero FM.

behaviors.name: SHIFT (RUN, transient/shape)
behaviors.trigger: RUN jack patched · MODE transient · RANGE shape
behaviors.description: Variable retrigger lockout. RUN voltage −5V→+5V sweeps receptiveness from 'always retriggerable' to 'retrigger only at end-of-cycle'. Emulates MATHS-style retrigger blocking with CV control over the lockout threshold.

behaviors.name: STRATA (RUN, sustain/shape)
behaviors.trigger: RUN patched · MODE sustain · RANGE shape
behaviors.description: ARSR envelope generator with CV-controlled sustain level (0–8V from RUN). Same hardware also becomes a six-channel slew limiter when driven by stepped voltages, tracking input CV with a per-channel lag.

behaviors.name: VOLLEY (RUN, cycle/shape)
behaviors.trigger: RUN patched · MODE cycle · RANGE shape
behaviors.description: Burst generator. Each trigger produces a CV-determined number of cycles: −4V = 1 cycle, 0V = 6 cycles, +5V = 36 cycles. Per-channel ratio scaling means ratcheted euclidean-style patterns fall out of the manifold.

behaviors.name: SPILL (RUN, transient/sound)
behaviors.trigger: RUN patched · MODE transient · RANGE sound
behaviors.description: Self-clocked impulse oscillator stack. IDENTITY free-runs; 2N–6N are re-triggered by IDENTITY's end-of-cycle, producing subharmonic drones. RUN voltage introduces retrigger chaos and sync-like timbres.

behaviors.name: PLUME (RUN, sustain/sound)
behaviors.trigger: RUN patched · MODE sustain · RANGE sound
behaviors.description: Six free-running VCOs through internal pluckable low-pass gates. TRIGGER inputs act like piano keys — short trigger = plucked note, sustained gate = held note. RUN shapes the LPG response. Instant 6-voice polysynth without external EGs, VCAs or LPGs.

behaviors.name: FLOOM (RUN, cycle/sound)
behaviors.trigger: RUN patched · MODE cycle · RANGE sound
behaviors.description: Each channel becomes a 2-operator FM voice with an internal sine modulator. RUN sets modulator:carrier ratio (−5V to +5V); the FM INPUT and FM knob now control FM depth. Specific RUN voltages produce inharmonic / noise timbres.

behaviors.name: MIX behaviour differs by range
behaviors.description: In shape, MIX emits the maximum of each slope divided by its index — effectively an envelope-priority output where IDENTITY dominates. In sound, MIX is a tanh-limited sum of all six channels, producing a warm ~15Vpp saturated chord or drone.

patchIdeas.name: One-cable polyrhythm
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE shape · INTONE CW · single clock → TRIGGER 6N (no other trigger patches) · all six channels fire with 1:2:3:4:5:6 phase resets · take OUT 1N–6N to six destinations for instant polyrhythmic modulation from a single gate
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: shape
* INTONE: CW

- Clock (Out) c> Just Friends (TRIGGER 6N) // cascades to all 6
- Just Friends (OUT 1N) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Just Friends (OUT 2N) >> VCA (CV)
- Just Friends (OUT 3N) >> VCO (FM)
- Just Friends (OUT 4N) >> FX (Time)

patchIdeas.name: PLUME six-voice polysynth
patchIdeas.patch: MODE sustain · RANGE sound · RUN patched (+1V) · v/oct → TIME · INTONE sets chord voicing · individual gates → TRIGGER 1N–6N act as keys · MIX = full six-voice poly output with internal LPGs and VCAs
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: sustain
* RANGE: sound
* RUN: patched

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Just Friends (TIME)
- Offset (+1V) >> Just Friends (RUN)
- Gate 1 (Out) g> Just Friends (TRIGGER 1N)
- Gate 2 (Out) g> Just Friends (TRIGGER 2N)
- Gate 3 (Out) g> Just Friends (TRIGGER 3N)
- Just Friends (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FLOOM FM chord
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE sound · RUN patched · FM knob CW · audio-rate source → FM INPUT · INTONE CW for harmonic stack · each channel becomes a 2-op FM voice at its N ratio · MIX = saturated FM chord · modulate RUN for timbre shifts
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: sound
* RUN: patched · FM knob CW
* INTONE: CW (overtones)

VCO:
LFO:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Just Friends (TIME)
- VCO (Out) -> Just Friends (FM INPUT)
- LFO (Out) >> Just Friends (RUN) // timbre morph
- Just Friends (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: VOLLEY burst ratchets
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE shape · RUN patched with +2V (a few cycles per burst) · clock → TRIGGER 6N · every clock triggers a controlled burst on each channel · OUT 6N = fastest ratchet · great for drum fills and euclidean flams
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: shape
* RUN: ~+2V

- Clock (Out) t> Just Friends (TRIGGER 6N)
- Offset (+2V) >> Just Friends (RUN) // burst count
- Just Friends (OUT 6N) t> Drum (Trig) // ratcheted hits
- Just Friends (OUT 1N) t> Drum 2 (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Six related LFOs for animation
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE shape · INTONE noon+slight CCW for gently diverging rates · RUN unpatched · OUT 1N–6N → six different modulation destinations (filter, FM, wavefolder, pan, reverb time, VCA) · one module animates a whole voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: shape
* INTONE: just CCW of noon

- Just Friends (OUT 1N) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Just Friends (OUT 2N) >> VCO (FM)
- Just Friends (OUT 3N) >> Wavefolder (Amount)
- Just Friends (OUT 4N) >> Pan (CV)
- Just Friends (OUT 5N) >> Reverb (Time)
- Just Friends (OUT 6N) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Harmonic chord oscillator
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE sound · INTONE full CW · TIME v/oct from sequencer · IDENTITY = fundamental, 2N = octave, 3N = octave+5th, 4N = 2 octaves, 5N = 2 oct+major 3rd, 6N = 2 oct+5th · mix selected outs for chord voicing
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: sound
* INTONE: full CW

Mixer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Just Friends (TIME)
- Just Friends (OUT 1N) -> Mixer (In) // root
- Just Friends (OUT 3N) -> Mixer (In) // 5th
- Just Friends (OUT 5N) -> Mixer (In) // major 3rd
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: ASR envelope + trapezoid VCO pair
patchIdeas.patch: MODE sustain · RANGE shape on TRIGGER 1N for gated ASR → VCA CV · second cable: RANGE sound via a switched mult is not possible, so stay in shape and use OUT 2N for a related slower ASR envelope to the filter · single gate drives filter + VCA together
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: sustain
* RANGE: shape

- Gate (Out) g> Just Friends (TRIGGER 1N)
- Just Friends (OUT 1N) >> VCA (CV)
- Just Friends (OUT 2N) >> Filter (Cutoff) // slower related ASR

patchIdeas.name: SHIFT analog clock divider
patchIdeas.patch: MODE transient · RANGE shape · RUN patched near +5V (end-of-cycle retrigger only) · fast clock → TRIGGER 6N · OUT 1N–6N each divide the clock by 1,2,3,4,5,6 as slope channels · also get shaped envelopes while dividing
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: transient
* RANGE: shape
* RUN: ~+5V (retrigger at EOC only)

- Clock (Out) c> Just Friends (TRIGGER 6N)
- Offset (+5V) >> Just Friends (RUN)
- Just Friends (OUT 2N) t> Drum (Trig) // /2
- Just Friends (OUT 3N) t> Drum (Trig) // /3

patchIdeas.name: Through-zero ratio FM
patchIdeas.patch: MODE cycle · RANGE sound · FM knob full CCW (sends FM INPUT to INTONE) · audio-rate VCO → FM INPUT · modulating INTONE at audio rate re-voices the manifold each cycle · discordant shifting chord drone via MIX
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: cycle
* RANGE: sound
* FM knob: full CCW (→ INTONE)

VCO:

- VCO (Out) -> Just Friends (FM INPUT)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Just Friends (TIME)
- Just Friends (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: STRATA six-channel slew
patchIdeas.patch: MODE sustain · RANGE shape · RUN patched (sets sustain level) · stepped CV sources → TRIGGER inputs as gates · each OUT 1N–6N is a slew-limited version with per-channel ratio · use to smooth six sequencer lanes into flowing CV
patchIdeas.diagram:
Just Friends:
* MODE: sustain
* RANGE: shape
* RUN: patched (sustain level)

- CV 1 (Out) >> Just Friends (TRIGGER 1N)
- CV 2 (Out) >> Just Friends (TRIGGER 2N)
- Offset (+4V) >> Just Friends (RUN)
- Just Friends (OUT 1N) >> VCO 1 (FM) // slewed
- Just Friends (OUT 2N) >> VCO 2 (FM)
